# Changelog Notes

> Notable changes that affect how the project works or how agents should operate.

<!-- Add entries when significant changes are made. Severity: breaking | notable | minor. Agent Impact describes what agents must do differently. Example:
| 2025-02-01 | Migrated auth from sessions to JWT | breaking | auth, middleware, all routes | Compliance requirement | Agents must use Authorization header instead of cookie for API calls |
| 2025-02-10 | Added rate limiting middleware | notable | API routes | Abuse prevention | Agents should handle 429 responses with exponential backoff |
